spots.name: Shibuya Sky observation deck
spots.desc: 360° rooftop view over the city grid — golden hour turns the skyline amber. Arrive 45 min before sunset to secure a west-facing spot.

spots.name: Sumida River at Asakusa
spots.desc: Traditional temple district with the Skytree reflected in the river. Dawn light hits the Senso-ji gate perfectly for misty morning shots.

spots.name: Shinjuku Gyoen garden
spots.desc: Manicured gardens with seasonal colour — cherry blossoms in spring, maple reds in autumn. Soft diffused light at dusk ideal for couples photography.

spots.name: Sunda Kelapa old harbour
spots.desc: Historic Dutch colonial port with traditional wooden schooners. Dawn light reflects gold off the water and weathered hulls.

spots.name: Monas National Monument plaza
spots.desc: Open plaza with the 132m golden flame monument — dramatic silhouette photography at dusk with clear western horizon.

spots.name: Ancol beachfront
spots.desc: North Jakarta's seafront promenade facing the Java Sea — unobstructed sunset views with fishing boats in the foreground.

spots.name: Humayun's Tomb gardens
spots.desc: Mughal architecture glows warm red at golden hour. Symmetrical gardens create leading lines toward the central dome.

spots.name: Qutub Minar at dusk
spots.desc: India's tallest minaret surrounded by ruins — late afternoon light carves dramatic shadows across the sandstone carvings.

spots.name: India Gate at sunset
spots.desc: War memorial with open lawns and wide western sky. Long golden hour shadows stretch across the Rajpath boulevard.

spots.name: Marine Drive seafront
spots.desc: The Queen's Necklace — a 3km arc of art deco buildings facing the Arabian Sea. Best at dusk when street lights begin to mirror the sunset.

spots.name: Gateway of India
spots.desc: Iconic colonial arch framing the harbour — shoot from the water taxi for a full frontal golden hour composition.

spots.name: Bandra-Worli Sea Link at night
spots.desc: Cable-stayed bridge over the sea — blue hour gives the cables a dramatic contrast against the darkening sky.

spots.name: Rizal Park baywalk
spots.desc: Manila Bay faces due west — consistently ranked among Asia's top sunset spots. Arrive 1 hour before sunset for the full colour sequence.

spots.name: Intramuros city walls
spots.desc: 16th century Spanish fortifications with cannon-lined ramparts. Golden light on stone walls creates timeless travel portraits.

spots.name: BGC rooftop bars
spots.desc: Bonifacio Global City's modern skyline offers elevated sunset angles over the metro from several accessible rooftop venues.

spots.name: The Bund waterfront
spots.desc: Colonial-era facades on the west bank face the futuristic Pudong skyline across the Huangpu River — blue hour is spectacular here.

spots.name: Yu Garden at golden hour
spots.desc: Ming dynasty classical garden with zigzag bridges and pavilions. Low golden light through willow trees creates painterly compositions.

spots.name: Oriental Pearl Tower base
spots.desc: Shoot upward at the pink sphere against the sky — works best at dusk when the tower lights activate against the fading blue.

spots.name: Ibirapuera Park lake
spots.desc: Sprawling urban park with the Oscar Niemeyer auditorium reflected in the central lake — sunrise mist makes for ethereal long exposures.

spots.name: Vila Madalena street murals
spots.desc: Entire neighbourhood covered in vibrant graffiti art — soft overcast light eliminates harsh shadows for vivid colour photography.

spots.name: Edificio Italia rooftop
spots.desc: Historic skyscraper with open-air terrace — one of the best elevated sunset viewpoints over the entire metropolitan sprawl.

spots.name: Namsan Seoul Tower
spots.desc: Hilltop tower with 360° city views — golden hour turns the Han River gold and the city grid glows warmly below.

spots.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace courtyard
spots.desc: Joseon dynasty palace with mountain backdrop — dawn light before crowds arrive gives peaceful, fog-draped compositions.

spots.name: Banpo Bridge rainbow fountain
spots.desc: World's longest bridge fountain over the Han River — best photographed at dusk when the lit water arcs contrast the darkening sky.

spots.name: Zócalo main square at dusk
spots.desc: One of the world's largest plazas flanked by the Metropolitan Cathedral — evening light on the baroque facade is extraordinary.

spots.name: Chapultepec Castle hilltop
spots.desc: Elevated castle with panoramic city views — golden hour haze over the valley creates atmospheric wide-angle shots.

spots.name: Coyoacán neighbourhood streets
spots.desc: Bohemian colonial quarter with colourful facades and cobblestones — blue hour street photography when cafes light up.

spots.name: Giza Plateau at sunrise
spots.desc: The pyramids face east and catch the very first light of dawn — arrive before 6am for the iconic silhouette against a pink sky.

spots.name: Al-Azhar Park hilltop
spots.desc: Elevated garden overlooking medieval Cairo and its minarets — sunset turns the entire Islamic city district golden.

spots.name: Nile Corniche at dusk
spots.desc: Riverside promenade with feluccas on the water — the sun sets behind the west bank desert cliffs creating dramatic silhouettes.

spots.name: Clifton Beach at sunset
spots.desc: Wide Arabian Sea beach facing southwest — vivid sunsets year-round with camel silhouettes and fishing boats in the foreground.

spots.name: Mohatta Palace gardens
spots.desc: Pink Jodhpur stone palace glowing warm at golden hour — ornate Mughal-Rajput architecture with manicured lawns.

spots.name: French Beach rocky coastline
spots.desc: Wild rocky shore north of the city — crashing waves and tidal pools make for dramatic long-exposure seascapes at dusk.

spots.name: Buriganga River at dawn
spots.desc: Ancient river with wooden ferries and riverside life — misty sunrise light creates atmospheric silhouette compositions.

spots.name: Lalbagh Fort at golden hour
spots.desc: 17th century Mughal fort with the unfinished mosque casting long shadows — warm brick tones intensify at dusk.

spots.name: Hatirjheel lake boardwalk
spots.desc: Modern lakeside promenade in the city centre — reflections of the illuminated bridges begin at blue hour.

spots.name: Brooklyn Bridge at sunrise
spots.desc: Cross to the Manhattan side before dawn to catch the first light hitting the Gothic towers with the skyline behind.

spots.name: Top of the Rock observation deck
spots.desc: Rockefeller Center rooftop gives the classic Empire State Building framed shot — golden hour turns midtown amber.

spots.name: DUMBO waterfront
spots.desc: The iconic Manhattan Bridge framed down Washington Street — blue hour with the bridge lights and reflected puddles is unmissable.

spots.name: Griffith Observatory
spots.desc: Hilltop observatory with the Hollywood sign and city basin below — golden hour before sunset paints the sky in layers of orange and pink.

spots.name: Venice Beach boardwalk
spots.desc: West-facing beach with Pacific horizon sunsets — silhouette photography of skaters, palms and the pier.

spots.name: Runyon Canyon summit
spots.desc: Hiking trail above Hollywood with downtown LA in the distance — dawn light over the basin is misty and atmospheric.

spots.name: Tower Bridge at blue hour
spots.desc: The Thames bends here giving both bridge towers in one frame — blue hour with the illuminated bridge is world-class.

spots.name: Parliament Hill on Hampstead Heath
spots.desc: Elevated view south over the entire city skyline — golden hour from this vantage point is one of London's best kept secrets.

spots.name: Greenwich Park hilltop
spots.desc: The Royal Observatory lawn looks north over Canary Wharf and the City — dawn light on clear days reveals the full skyline.

spots.name: Trocadéro plaza at golden hour
spots.desc: The Eiffel Tower faces east from here — morning golden hour light hits the iron lattice from the front for iconic lit compositions.

spots.name: Montmartre Sacré-Cœur steps
spots.desc: Hilltop basilica with a view over the entire city — dusk from the steps as the city lights begin to flicker is breathtaking.

spots.name: Seine riverbanks at blue hour
spots.desc: The Pont Alexandre III with its gilded statues and the Grand Palais beyond — blue hour reflections in the river are stunning.

spots.name: Galata Tower viewpoint
spots.desc: Medieval tower in the heart of the city with 360° views — golden hour over the Bosphorus and minarets from the balcony.

spots.name: Süleymaniye Mosque courtyard
spots.desc: Ottoman masterpiece on a hill above the Golden Horn — dusk call to prayer with the city glowing below is unforgettable.

spots.name: Ortaköy waterfront mosque
spots.desc: Neo-baroque mosque on the Bosphorus shore with the suspension bridge behind — blue hour when the bridge lights up is spectacular.

spots.name: Burj Khalifa base at dusk
spots.desc: Shoot upward along the tapered facade as it changes colour from gold to purple — the fountains begin at sunset adding foreground interest.

spots.name: Al Fahidi historical district
spots.desc: Wind-tower architecture in the old city — late afternoon light on the cream-coloured buildings before the modern skyline backdrop.

spots.name: Desert dunes at golden hour
spots.desc: 30 min outside the city — crescent dunes with smooth shadow lines at low sun angle make minimalist abstract compositions.

spots.name: Marina Bay Sands rooftop
spots.desc: Iconic observation deck overlooking the bay and city skyline — golden hour from here is one of Asia's best viewpoints.

spots.name: Gardens by the Bay at dusk
spots.desc: Supertree Grove with 50m vertical gardens — blue hour when the trees light up against the darkening sky is extraordinary.

spots.name: Henderson Waves bridge
spots.desc: Wave-shaped pedestrian bridge in the southern ridge forest — dawn mist through the jungle canopy creates ethereal conditions.

spots.name: Wat Arun riverside temple
spots.desc: Temple of Dawn faces east across the Chao Phraya — shoot from the opposite bank at sunrise for the porcelain-encrusted spires lit in gold.

spots.name: Mahanakhon Skywalk
spots.desc: Bangkok's highest observation deck with glass floor — sunset over the river meander and temple rooftops is exceptional.

spots.name: Lumpini Park lake at dawn
spots.desc: Central city park with rowing boats and monitor lizards — early morning mist over the water before the heat rises.

spots.name: Victoria Peak at dusk
spots.desc: The classic Hong Kong skyline shot — golden hour turns the harbour gold and the neon begins at blue hour. Arrive 90 min before sunset.

spots.name: Tsim Sha Tsui waterfront promenade
spots.desc: Kowloon side facing the island skyline — the Symphony of Lights show begins at 8pm making blue hour doubly spectacular.

spots.name: Lion Rock summit
spots.desc: Challenging hike rewarded with panoramic views over both sides of the territory — dawn from the ridge is transformative.

spots.name: Mrs Macquaries Chair headland
spots.desc: The classic Opera House and Harbour Bridge in one frame — golden hour from this point is Sydney's most photographed view.

spots.name: Bondi to Coogee coastal walk
spots.desc: Sea cliffs and rock pools facing east — sunrise over the Pacific from any of the headlands along this walk is spectacular.

spots.name: Pyrmont Bridge at blue hour
spots.desc: Historic swing bridge over Darling Harbour — blue hour when the casino and hotel lights reflect in the water.

spots.name: Flinders Street Station at dusk
spots.desc: Victorian-era station with dome and clocks — dusk light on the yellow facade with tram trails for long exposure street photography.

spots.name: St Kilda pier at sunset
spots.desc: Wooden pier extending into Port Phillip Bay facing west — dramatic cloud formations make every sunset unique here.

spots.name: Eureka Skydeck observation
spots.desc: Southern hemisphere's highest observation deck — 360° golden hour views over the bay and the Dandenong Ranges.

spots.name: CN Tower base at dusk
spots.desc: Look straight up the 553m tower as the sky transitions — blue hour when the tower lights change colour is mesmerising.

spots.name: Distillery District cobblestones
spots.desc: Victorian industrial architecture with warm brick tones — golden hour in the pedestrian-only lanes creates rich street photography.

spots.name: Toronto Islands west beach
spots.desc: West-facing beach with the downtown skyline as backdrop — golden hour from the water with the CN Tower silhouetted.

spots.name: Cloud Gate at dawn
spots.desc: Millennium Park's mirrored sculpture before the crowds — dawn reflections of the skyline in the polished steel are surreal.

spots.name: Navy Pier at sunset
spots.desc: Lake Michigan stretches east so the pier faces open water — turn west for the sunset behind the city skyline.

spots.name: Chicago Riverwalk at blue hour
spots.desc: The river canyon of skyscrapers lit at blue hour — shoot long exposures from the lower Wacker Drive bridges.

spots.name: Brouwersgracht canal at dawn
spots.desc: Quietest and most photogenic canal in the city — misty morning reflections of 17th century merchant houses before 7am.

spots.name: A'DAM Lookout rooftop
spots.desc: North Amsterdam tower with 360° views over the IJ waterway and city — golden hour from the rooftop swing is iconic.

spots.name: Keukenhof tulip fields
spots.desc: 30 min from the city in spring — vast tulip fields at golden hour create abstract colour field compositions.

spots.name: Bunkers del Carmel hilltop
spots.desc: Former civil war bunkers with the best 360° panoramic view in Barcelona — golden hour over the Sagrada Família and the sea.

spots.name: Park Güell terrace at dusk
spots.desc: Gaudí's mosaic terrace faces southwest over the city — arrive 2 hours before sunset to get through security in time.

spots.name: Barceloneta beach at sunrise
spots.desc: East-facing Mediterranean beach with the city behind — dawn colours over the sea before the crowds arrive.

spots.name: Pincio Terrace in Villa Borghese
spots.desc: Elevated terrace with the most famous view of St Peter's Basilica — golden hour from here has inspired painters for centuries.

spots.name: Gianicolo Hill at sunset
spots.desc: The highest viewpoint in Rome looking east over the entire city — the dome of St Peter's glows warm amber at dusk.

spots.name: Ponte Sant'Angelo at blue hour
spots.desc: Angel-lined bridge over the Tiber with Castel Sant'Angelo behind — blue hour when the fortress lights up is unmissable.

spots.name: Templo de Debod at sunset
spots.desc: Ancient Egyptian temple donated to Spain — the reflecting pool turns golden at sunset and the western sky is open and clear.

spots.name: Retiro Park lake at golden hour
spots.desc: Rowing boats on the central lake with the Crystal Palace beyond — afternoon light filters through the mature trees perfectly.

spots.name: Círculo de Bellas Artes rooftop
spots.desc: Central rooftop terrace with views over the Gran Vía — dusk cocktail hour here doubles as a photography session.

spots.name: East Side Gallery at golden hour
spots.desc: 1.3km of Berlin Wall murals along the Spree — low golden light rakes across the painted concrete for vivid colour photography.

spots.name: Teufelsberg hilltop ruins
spots.desc: Cold War spy station ruins on a forested hill — dawn from the observation dome gives panoramic city views through broken glass.

spots.name: Oberbaumbrücke at blue hour
spots.desc: Red brick double-decker bridge over the Spree — blue hour with the yellow U-Bahn crossing and its reflection below.

spots.name: Kahlenberg hilltop
spots.desc: Vineyard-covered hill overlooking the entire Vienna basin and the Danube — golden hour from the wine tavern terrace is magical.

spots.name: Schönbrunn Palace gardens
spots.desc: Baroque imperial gardens on a slope — the Gloriette arch at the top frames the palace and city below at golden hour.

spots.name: Naschmarkt at dawn
spots.desc: Historic outdoor market with art nouveau architecture — early morning light before vendors arrive for atmospheric street photography.

spots.name: Charles Bridge at dawn
spots.desc: Medieval bridge with 30 baroque statues — arrive by 5:30am in summer for mist over the Vltava and zero crowds.

spots.name: Letná Park terrace
spots.desc: Elevated riverside park with the best panoramic view of the red rooftops and the river meander — golden hour is superb.

spots.name: Vítkov Hill memorial
spots.desc: Giant equestrian statue on a hill east of the city — dawn light behind the statue with the entire city below.

spots.name: Fisherman's Bastion at sunrise
spots.desc: Neo-Gothic terraces on Castle Hill — arrive before 7am to photograph the Parliament building across the Danube in soft pink light.

spots.name: Gellért Hill citadel
spots.desc: The highest point above the city — golden hour from the Liberty Statue looking down over both sides of the river.

spots.name: Chain Bridge at blue hour
spots.desc: Hungary's most photographed bridge — blue hour when the lion-guarded bridge lights up with the lit Parliament beyond.

spots.name: Vorobyovy Gory viewpoint
spots.desc: Sparrow Hills overlook gives the classic Moscow skyline shot with the university tower — golden hour in autumn with orange leaves.

spots.name: Red Square at blue hour
spots.desc: St Basil's Cathedral lit against the dark sky — blue hour when the coloured onion domes glow is extraordinary.

spots.name: Moscow City skyscrapers
spots.desc: Modern financial district best photographed from the Luzhniki bridge — dusk when the towers light up against the fading sky.

spots.name: Jingshan Park hilltop
spots.desc: Coal Hill directly north of the Forbidden City — the only elevated view of the imperial palace complex. Dawn is magical.

spots.name: Temple of Heaven at sunrise
spots.desc: Circular ceremonial temple in a vast park — early morning tai chi practitioners beneath ancient cypresses create timeless images.

spots.name: The Great Wall at Mutianyu
spots.desc: 1.5 hours from the city — golden hour on the watchtowers with forested mountains below in autumn colours.

spots.name: Battery Spencer overlook
spots.desc: Marin Headlands viewpoint directly across from the Golden Gate Bridge — golden hour from the north side is the definitive shot.

spots.name: Twin Peaks summit
spots.desc: Twin hilltops at the city's centre — 360° panorama of the bay, bridges and downtown at golden hour.

spots.name: Embarcadero Ferry Building
spots.desc: Historic terminal on the bay facing east — dawn light over the East Bay hills with the Bay Bridge silhouetted.

spots.name: South Beach Art Deco district
spots.desc: Pastel-coloured 1930s hotels on Ocean Drive — golden hour from the beach looking west turns the facades deeply saturated.

spots.name: Brickell Key at dusk
spots.desc: Island with 360° views of the downtown skyline and Biscayne Bay — blue hour reflections of the towers in the water.

spots.name: Everglades at sunrise
spots.desc: 45 min from the city — wide open sawgrass prairie with unobstructed horizon sunrises and wading birds in the foreground.

spots.name: Cristo Redentor at sunrise
spots.desc: Take the first cog train at dawn — soft pink light on the statue before the crowds and clouds build up later in the day.

spots.name: Arpoador rock at sunset
spots.desc: Natural rock headland between Ipanema and Copacabana — crowds gather here at sunset for a reason. West-facing open sea.

spots.name: Sugarloaf Mountain cable car
spots.desc: Second stage at 395m gives views over the entire bay and Guanabara — golden hour before the last cable car down.

spots.name: La Boca Caminito street
spots.desc: Colourful corrugated iron houses in the old port district — overcast diffused light eliminates harsh shadows for vivid colour.

spots.name: Puerto Madero waterfront at dusk
spots.desc: Modern dock district with the Woman's Bridge — blue hour when the bridge lights and glass towers reflect in the docks.

spots.name: Palermo lakes at golden hour
spots.desc: Rowing lake in the vast Palermo parks — golden afternoon light through the rose garden with the city skyline behind.

spots.name: Miraflores cliff tops
spots.desc: Coastal cliffs above the Pacific facing southwest — sunset over the open ocean with paragliders silhouetted against the sky.

spots.name: Huaca Pucllana ruins
spots.desc: Pre-Inca adobe pyramid in the middle of the city — golden hour on the ochre terraces is architecturally dramatic.

spots.name: Barranco bohemian district
spots.desc: Colourful colonial houses on the cliff edge — the Bridge of Sighs and Pacific view at dusk is Lima's most romantic spot.

spots.name: Monserrate hilltop church
spots.desc: 3,152m summit above the city with cable car access — golden hour from the sanctuary looks out over the entire Bogotá savanna.

spots.name: La Candelaria colonial centre
spots.desc: Historic downtown with colourful colonial architecture and political murals — overcast Andean light is ideal for street photography.

spots.name: Usaquén flea market
spots.desc: Upscale colonial neighbourhood with cobblestone streets — golden afternoon light on the whitewashed church and market stalls.

spots.name: Bar Beach Victoria Island
spots.desc: South-facing Atlantic beach with wide open horizon — dramatic tropical sunsets year-round with fishing pirogues in the foreground.

spots.name: Lekki Conservation Centre canopy
spots.desc: Africa's longest canopy walkway over mangrove forest — dawn light through the trees with egrets below.

spots.name: Third Mainland Bridge at dusk
spots.desc: Longest bridge in Africa over Lagos Lagoon — shoot from the Adeniji side for the bridge stretching into the city at blue hour.

spots.name: Nairobi National Park at dawn
spots.desc: The only national park bordering a capital city — lions and giraffes silhouetted against the Nairobi skyline at sunrise.

spots.name: Karura Forest waterfall
spots.desc: Urban forest with hidden waterfalls — soft morning light in the bamboo groves before the city wakes up.

spots.name: KICC rooftop observation
spots.desc: Tallest building in the CBD — golden hour views over the city and the Ngong Hills on the horizon to the west.

spots.name: Constitution Hill at sunset
spots.desc: Former prison turned human rights museum on a hill — golden hour over the Johannesburg skyline from the ramparts.

spots.name: Walter Sisulu Botanical Garden
spots.desc: Witwatersrand ridge garden with a resident pair of Verreaux's eagles — dawn light over the Magaliesberg hills to the west.

spots.name: Soweto Orlando Towers
spots.desc: Twin cooling towers painted with murals — golden afternoon light on the township streetscape below from the bridge between towers.

spots.name: Signal Hill at sunset
spots.desc: Accessible hilltop directly above the city bowl — the sun sets over the Atlantic beyond Lion's Head for dramatic silhouettes.

spots.name: Boulders Beach penguin colony
spots.desc: African penguins on a sheltered cove — dawn light with the penguins emerging from their burrows before tourists arrive.

spots.name: Chapman's Peak drive
spots.desc: Cliff-hugging coastal road above the Atlantic — road curves at golden hour give leading-line compositions with the sea far below.

spots.name: Hassan II Mosque seafront
spots.desc: The world's largest mosque built on the Atlantic — golden hour light on the white marble with crashing waves below the terrace.

spots.name: Corniche beachfront
spots.desc: North-facing Atlantic promenade — winter sunset storms create dramatic moody seascape conditions here.

spots.name: Old Medina rooftops
spots.desc: Traditional neighbourhood rooftops with the minaret above — dusk call to prayer with the sea visible in the distance.

spots.name: Milad Tower observation deck
spots.desc: Iran's tallest structure at 435m — golden hour over the Alborz mountain range to the north with the city sprawl below.

spots.name: Darband mountain trail
spots.desc: Trek into the Alborz foothills north of the city — dawn light through the gorge with teahouses and waterfalls.

spots.name: Golestan Palace courtyards
spots.desc: Qajar dynasty palace complex — late afternoon light on the mirrored mosaic and tile work is extraordinarily rich.

spots.name: Kingdom Tower Sky Bridge
spots.desc: Observation bridge at 300m through the hole in the tower — golden hour over the endless desert city grid below.

spots.name: Diriyah mud-brick ruins
spots.desc: UNESCO-listed original Saudi capital in ochre mud-brick — sunset light on the ancient walls creates deeply textured photography.

spots.name: Edge of the World escarpment
spots.desc: 90 min from the city — sheer 300m cliffs over the Tuwaiq plateau. Golden hour here feels like the end of the earth.

spots.name: Petronas Towers at blue hour
spots.desc: Shoot from KLCC Park lake — blue hour when the twin towers reflect in the water and the sky transitions from orange to deep blue.

spots.name: Batu Caves at dawn
spots.desc: Hindu temple in a limestone cave — early morning light streams through the cave mouth onto the golden statue below.

spots.name: Bukit Ampang viewpoint
spots.desc: Hilltop east of the city — golden hour panorama over the entire KL skyline with the Petronas Towers as centrepiece.

spots.name: Bitexco Financial Tower Skydeck
spots.desc: 49th floor observation deck with 360° city views — golden hour over the Saigon River as it winds through the urban grid.

spots.name: Ben Thanh Market at dawn
spots.desc: Historic colonial market building — early morning light before the crowds, vendors setting up amid long shadows.

spots.name: Saigon River at dusk
spots.desc: Take a water taxi to photograph the city skyline from the river — blue hour when the towers begin to light up is spectacular.

spots.name: Hoan Kiem Lake at dawn
spots.desc: Central lake with the red Huc Bridge and Ngoc Son temple — misty dawn before 6am with locals doing tai chi on the banks.

spots.name: Long Bien Bridge
spots.desc: French colonial railway bridge — golden hour light through the iron lattice with the Red River flowing far below.

spots.name: Old Quarter rooftops
spots.desc: 36 ancient trade streets seen from above — late afternoon light on the tightly packed yellow colonial buildings.

spots.name: Elephant Mountain at dusk
spots.desc: 45-minute hike to the Taipei 101 shooting spot — the classic shot of the tower against a golden sky over the city.

spots.name: Tamsui riverside at sunset
spots.desc: Former colonial port town at the river mouth — west-facing waterfront watching the sun set over the Taiwan Strait.

spots.name: Jiufen tea house hillside
spots.desc: 40 min from the city — lantern-lit hillside tea houses above the sea at dusk, the inspiration for Spirited Away.

spots.name: Dotonbori canal at blue hour
spots.desc: Neon-lit entertainment canal — blue hour when the giant Glico running man and crab signs reflect in the water below.

spots.name: Osaka Castle park at dawn
spots.desc: 17th century castle keep surrounded by cherry trees — dawn mist in the moat before the gates open to the public.

spots.name: Umeda Sky Building
spots.desc: Twin tower with rooftop floating garden — 360° golden hour views over the Osaka-Kobe-Kyoto urban corridor.

spots.name: Fushimi Inari shrine at dawn
spots.desc: The famous torii gate tunnels — arrive before 6am to photograph the vermillion gates in mist without any crowds.

spots.name: Arashiyama bamboo grove
spots.desc: Towering bamboo at dawn before 7am — diffused morning light through the canopy creates an otherworldly green atmosphere.

spots.name: Kiyomizudera temple balcony
spots.desc: Wooden stage over the hillside facing west — golden hour from the balcony with the pagoda and autumn maples.

spots.name: Howrah Bridge at dawn
spots.desc: Massive cantilever bridge over the Hooghly — dawn light with flower sellers crossing on foot and ferries below.

spots.name: Victoria Memorial gardens
spots.desc: White marble palace in Maidan park — golden hour on the Mughal-Renaissance architecture with reflecting pool.

spots.name: Princep Ghat riverside
spots.desc: Colonial-era ghat on the Hooghly — sunset from the arched monument with rowing boats on the river.

spots.name: Marina Beach at sunrise
spots.desc: The world's second longest urban beach facing east — dawn over the Bay of Bengal with fishermen launching boats into the surf.

spots.name: Kapaleeshwarar Temple gopuram
spots.desc: Dravidian tower covered in painted sculptures — golden afternoon light before the 6pm puja ceremony.

spots.name: San Thome Cathedral at dusk
spots.desc: Neo-Gothic white cathedral on the beachfront — blue hour with the illuminated facade against the darkening sea.

spots.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
spots.desc: 18th century garden with a central glass house — dawn light through the tropical trees before the morning walkers arrive.

spots.name: Nandi Hills sunrise
spots.desc: 60 km north of the city — ancient hilltop fort above the clouds at 1,478m. Arrive by 5:30am for the cloud sea at sunrise.

spots.name: Cubbon Park at golden hour
spots.desc: Central city park with colonial-era red buildings — late afternoon light filters through the rain trees.

spots.name: Charminar at golden hour
spots.desc: 400-year-old mosque-minaret in the old city — golden afternoon light on the grey granite makes the structure glow warm.

spots.name: Hussain Sagar lake at dusk
spots.desc: Large central lake with the 18m Buddha statue on an island — blue hour with the lit statue reflected in the water.

spots.name: Golconda Fort at sunset
spots.desc: Hilltop 16th century fort with 360° panoramic views — golden hour from the Bala Hisar gate ramparts is spectacular.

spots.name: Badshahi Mosque at golden hour
spots.desc: Mughal-era mosque with the largest courtyard in the world — late afternoon light on the red sandstone is extraordinary.

spots.name: Lahore Fort Sheesh Mahal
spots.desc: Palace of mirrors inside the Mughal fort — golden afternoon light through the lattice windows creates kaleidoscopic effects.

spots.name: Shalimar Gardens
spots.desc: UNESCO-listed Mughal garden with fountains and pavilions — golden hour from the upper terraces looking down the water channels.

spots.name: Galle Face Green at sunset
spots.desc: Ocean-front promenade facing due west — Sri Lanka's most popular sunset gathering spot with kite flyers and street food.

spots.name: Gangaramaya Temple lake
spots.desc: Buddhist temple on Beira Lake — golden hour with the lotus flowers, monks in orange robes and the city reflection.

spots.name: Mount Lavinia beach
spots.desc: Crescent beach south of the city with the colonial hotel above — golden hour from the rocks with breaking waves.

spots.name: Swayambhunath stupa at sunrise
spots.desc: Monkey Temple on a hilltop — dawn light on the golden spire with the Himalayan foothills visible on clear days.

spots.name: Boudhanath stupa at dusk
spots.desc: The world's largest stupa — blue hour as the butter lamps are lit and monks circle the base in procession.

spots.name: Nagarkot ridge at dawn
spots.desc: 30 km east of the city — clear winter mornings reveal the full Himalayan panorama from Dhaulagiri to Everest at sunrise.

spots.name: Labadi Beach at sunset
spots.desc: West-facing Atlantic beach east of the city — vivid tropical sunsets with fishing canoes and beach volleyball silhouettes.

spots.name: Kwame Nkrumah Mausoleum
spots.desc: Marble memorial in a park — golden afternoon light on the glass pyramid structure and eternal flame.

spots.name: Jamestown lighthouse
spots.desc: Colonial-era lighthouse in the old fishing district — golden hour above the colourful fishing boats in the harbour below.

spots.name: Entoto Hill eucalyptus forest
spots.desc: Forested ridge above the city at 3,200m — dawn light through the eucalyptus trees with women carrying firewood.

spots.name: National Museum gardens
spots.desc: Home of Lucy the fossil — late afternoon golden light on the modernist building with jacaranda trees in bloom.

spots.name: Merkato market at dawn
spots.desc: Africa's largest open market — early morning light as traders set up their stalls under corrugated iron roofing.

spots.name: Coco Beach at sunset
spots.desc: North-facing Indian Ocean beach — golden hour from the rocky headland with dhows sailing past.

spots.name: Kivukoni Fish Market at dawn
spots.desc: Historic waterfront market — sunrise as the night fishing fleet returns with their catch to the wooden dhow harbour.

spots.name: Bongoyo Island beach
spots.desc: 20-minute ferry from the city — uninhabited island beach facing west for unobstructed Indian Ocean sunsets.

spots.name: Malecón seafront
spots.desc: 6km coastal boulevard facing west — open horizon sunsets with the city skyline silhouetted against the Caribbean sky.

spots.name: Zona Colonial rooftops
spots.desc: UNESCO-listed old town with colonial architecture casting long shadows during golden hour. Warm stone tones at dusk.

spots.name: Faro a Colón lighthouse
spots.desc: Brutalist cross-shaped landmark with dramatic geometry — ideal for dusk silhouette photography after dark.

spots.name: Malecón seawall at sunset
spots.desc: The iconic 8km seafront promenade facing north-west — golden hour with classic American cars and colourful facades behind.

spots.name: El Morro fortress ramparts
spots.desc: 16th century castle at the harbour entrance — golden hour from the lighthouse with the old city skyline across the water.

spots.name: Plaza Vieja rooftop terraces
spots.desc: Colonial square surrounded by pastel buildings — late afternoon light on the facades creates saturated travel photography.

spots.name: Irazú Volcano crater
spots.desc: 3,432m active volcano 1.5 hours from the city — dawn above the clouds with the Pacific and Caribbean both visible on clear days.

spots.name: Central Market at dawn
spots.desc: Historic 19th century market building — early morning light as vendors set up tropical fruit and flower stalls.

spots.name: La Sabana Metropolitan Park
spots.desc: Large city park with the art museum — golden afternoon light on the colonial building with the Talamanca mountains behind.

spots.name: Casco Viejo rooftops
spots.desc: UNESCO-listed colonial quarter on a peninsula — golden hour from any rooftop bar gives the old city and modern skyline in one frame.

spots.name: Panama Canal Miraflores locks
spots.desc: Watch massive ships pass at golden hour — the scale and engineering create dramatic industrial photography.

spots.name: Causeway islands at sunset
spots.desc: 3km causeway into the Pacific Bay — golden hour looking back at the Bridge of the Americas and the city skyline.

spots.name: Pacaya Volcano at sunrise
spots.desc: 90 min from the city — active lava flows at dawn with the Pacific coastal plain visible far below through the smoke.

spots.name: La Aurora Park gardens
spots.desc: Central park with the zoo and museums — golden hour light on the neoclassical architecture and tropical vegetation.

spots.name: Cerro del Baúl viewpoint
spots.desc: Hilltop above the city with panoramic views — golden hour over the surrounding volcanic landscape.
